name: list_files_in_dir
description: List all files in a directory path within the repository, one level deep. Use this to orient yourself in an unfamiliar module structure before deciding which files to read.

path.description: Relative path from the repository root (e.g. 'src/wiedunflow/adapters' or 'tests/unit'). Returns file names and sizes. Returns an error if the path does not exist.
